/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/DOMTest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/DOMTest.dir/tests/DOMTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DOMTest.dir/src/html/DOMNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DOMTest.dir/src/html/Tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DOMTest.dir/src/html/HTMLParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DOMTest.dir/src/html/TreeBuilder.cpp.o -o DOMTest
